name: Oringinal "Philly" Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and melted margarine; press onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 325 degrees F., for 10 minutes.
3. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese, sugar, lemon juice, lemon peel, and vanilla. Mix on medium speed until well blended.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
5. Beat egg whites until stiff peaks form; gently fold into the cream cheese mixture.
6. Pour over crust.
7. Bake at 300 degrees F., for 45 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan; cool before removing the rim of the pan.
9. Chill. Top with cherry pie filling or fresh fruit, if desired.
